## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #XX, or Refs #XX. Required for non-trivial changes. -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new user-facing behavior
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, non-user-facing
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] test — test-only changes
- [ ] style — formatting only

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the `type/topic` convention
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] Tests added or updated (or explain why not)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal journal data committed
- [ ] Respects Loam's principles (local-first, no streaks, no telemetry)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Required for UI changes. Drag and drop images here. -->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Tradeoffs, open questions, areas to focus on. -->
